title: Symbol literal with noLiterals (degrades to symbol)
description: degrades to bare symbol — unsupported at root
notes: `{noLiterals: true}` degrades the literal to its base type `symbol`, which is unsupported at root (see the `symbol` case above). The factory is rendered as alwaysThrow; the first `createXxx<typeof sym>()` call throws.
pureType:
const sym = Symbol('hello');
return createValidate<typeof sym>(undefined, {noLiterals: true});
